description_long: This is a rectangular stone block with a weathered, gray surface and intricate geometric carvings on all sides. The block is divided into two main segments by a horizontal groove, giving the appearance of stacked sections. The upper segment features a series of rounded arch-like engravings, while the lower segment displays angular, zigzag, and linear motifs. The stone has a rough, matte finish, with subtle pitting and texture variations typical of concrete or carved stone. Its solid, monolithic form suggests it is designed as a barrier or decorative obstacle in an urban or landscaped environment. The carvings evoke a stylized, possibly modern or abstract aesthetic, making it suitable for use in parks, plazas, or as part of public art installations.
description: A gray, rectangular stone block with geometric carvings and a weathered, rough surface, divided into two stacked segments. The upper part has arch-like engravings, while the lower part features angular and linear motifs.
description_view_0: This view highlights the rounded arch engravings on the upper segment and prominent zigzag carvings on the lower right side.
description_view_1: This angle shows more linear and vertical engravings on the lower segment, with the arch motifs still visible on top.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this side emphasizes the arch engravings and the angular carvings, but with a slightly different arrangement of lines.
description_view_3: This view displays the vertical and angular motifs on the lower segment, with the arch engravings on the upper part, mirroring view 1.
attribute_location_context: urban park or plaza decorative barrier
attribute_installation_method: set on a leveled concrete or compacted gravel base
attribute_weathering_pattern: The surface shows mild pitting and slight discoloration, indicating some exposure to the elements but no significant erosion or moss growth.
attribute_presence_of_markings_or_engrav: Geometric carvings and motifs are present on all sides.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: isolated or used as a standalone decorative barrier

license_info.creator_display_name: Museo de Arte Precolombino Casa del Alabado
